text.title: AI Video Generation Provider Selection Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: Pricing pipeline by LLM tokens instead of provider credits / seconds.
antipattern.root-cause: Team copies an LLM cost model into a video pipeline.
antipattern.fix: Re-cost on $0.05-0.50/second; budget per video × volume; verify against provider credit catalogue.

antipattern.symptom: Pipeline crashes when chosen provider returns 429 / quota_exhausted.
antipattern.fix: Always ship a fallback provider (Replicate open model) wired behind the same adapter interface.

antipattern.symptom: Promising cross-shot character consistency to stakeholders before pilot.
antipattern.root-cause: Marketing demo cherry-picks one seed and the team commits to it.
antipattern.fix: Pilot with 20 random seeds; measure consistency rate; document the limitation in the decision record.
